title: RESTORE - 211info
text: NEWBERG HABITAT RESTORE RESTORE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a store for the resale of donated goods and building materials. Donated items must be in reusable condition. ReStore does not accept anything rusty, damaged, soiled, or inoperative. Donation receiver(s) may turn away donations of items at will based on current inventory maximums and non-accepted items. Item donation pick-up and delivery available. 801 N Meridian Street Newberg, OR 97132 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Store: Thursday-Saturday 9am-5pm Donations: Thursday-Saturday 9am-4:30pm Pickup or Delivery: Thursday-Friday 9am-3pm Email (971) 281-1282 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Other (971) 281-1282 Restore Donations Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in for shopping. Visit the website to check on items accepted. Call to schedule a donation drop-off, pickup, and delivery. FEES: Varies by service DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Cities of Dayton, Dundee, Newberg, St. Paul, and Sherwood SITE HOURS: Thursday-Saturday 9am-5pm Services: Donation Drop Off Points Donation Pickups Low Cost Building Materials/Supplies Thrift Shops If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
